title: Wave 13 Release
description: Windsurf released Wave 13 with multi-agent workflow upgrades, performance enhancements, accessibility improvements, and terminal reliability improvements.

title: Claude Code Security Module Release
description: Anthropic released the Claude Code Security module for the web version, combining automated scanning with human-like analysis to identify business logic defects, access control issues, and other security vulnerabilities. The tool uses multi-stage verification to filter false positives and provides severity ratings for discovered vulnerabilities.

community_feedback.quote: AI杀到！Claude代码安全工具问世，全球网安股遭'血洗'，行业格局迎世纪重构
Cybersecurity stocks crashed: CrowdStrike -8%, Cloudflare -8%, Okta -9%, sector market cap evaporated by over $10 billion in one day
Claude Code Security: AI猎杀代码漏洞时代正式开启

title: Gemini CLI v0.29.0 Release
description: Google released Gemini CLI v0.29.0 as part of weekly updates. The tool continues to support Gemini 3 Pro and Flash models with enhanced reasoning and coding capabilities.

title: Google DeepMind Lyria 3 Integration
description: Google DeepMind released Lyria 3 music generation model in February 2026, now available in Gemini, expanding the CLI's multimodal capabilities.

title: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.6 Integration
description: GitHub Copilot integrated Anthropic's Claude Sonnet 4.6 model, which excels at complex agent-based coding tasks and search operations. Available across web, iOS/Android mobile apps, CLI, VS Code, and Visual Studio.

title: Cognition Reaches $10.2B Valuation
description: Cognition.AI reached a $10.2 billion valuation, making it the highest-valued company in the AI programming sector after raising over $400 million in funding. The company's ARR grew from $1M (September 2024) to $73M (June 2025).

community_feedback.quote: AI编程独角兽Cognition逆势狂飙！4亿美元融资推动估值飙升至102亿美元
成立两年ARR增长73倍，AI编程Cognition AI估值突破100亿美元

title: Claude Opus 4.6 Release
description: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.6, their first flagship model with 1 million token context window testing capabilities, with improvements in long-context querying, reasoning, and planning.
